name: Taki Shiina
description: **Height:** 156 cm Taki Shiina is a first-year student at Hanasakigawa Girls' High School and the drummer and composer of **[MyGO!!!!!](https://anilist.co/staff/292754/MyGO)**. Taki is a loner who enjoys being all alone. She works part-time at RiNG, but due to her blunt personality, short temper and the fact she has a tendency to glare at people, she isn't good at customer service. She is a bit of a perfectionist, but at the same time has an inferiority complex towards her older sister.

name: Yogi
description: The Second Ship's Fighter Yogi is an eccentric man who is always bright and cheerful. He is Hirato's subordinate. Despite his age, he tends to act like a child. He wears a white allergy patch on his left cheek, that, when removed, causes him to become extremely violent, as well as changing his hair color. While he states that battles make him nervous, he is still a skilled fighter. During the Circus's public shows he usually wears a cat costume named "Nyanperowna" and hands out candy to children

name: Itto Ogami
description: Ogami Itto seemed to have a very cushy life during Edo-Era Japan, for he had been the Shogun's official executioner (Kogi Kaishakunin). A position so powerful, the term "Second" meant that Itto was only second to the Shogun as far as metering out death to unloyal feudal lords throughout the 60 regions of Shogunate controlled Japan. name: Mei Kinosaki
description: ~!__Gender:__ Male!~ __Occupation:__ Swindler Mei Kinosaki is a marriage swindler who charms both men and women in order to get money from them to help keep their sick brother alive. Mei was saved by Gero after being captured by a crime syndicate that they had wronged. Mei agreed to help Gero find a wife in exchange for Gero's protection, and help with keeping their sick brother alive.
